activities_projects.title: Types of Natural Vegetation List
activities_projects.objective: Identify the major types of natural vegetation in India
steps: Read the section on types of vegetation
List the five major types of natural vegetation
Write one example tree for each vegetation type
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize the major vegetation types found in India

activities_projects.title: Vegetation Map Observation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the distribution of natural vegetation in India
steps: Observe the vegetation map in the chapter
Identify regions with evergreen forests
Write two states where each vegetation type is found
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the geographical distribution of forests

activities_projects.title: Flora and Fauna Identification
activities_projects.objective: Understand the meaning of flora and fauna
steps: Write the definition of flora and fauna
List five examples of flora found in India
List five examples of fauna found in India
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students differentiate between plant and animal life

activities_projects.title: Forest Animals Chart
activities_projects.objective: Learn about animals living in different forest types
steps: Divide the chart into five forest types
Write two animals found in each forest
Decorate with simple drawings of animals
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify wildlife associated with different vegetation

activities_projects.title: Medicinal Plants Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of medicinal plants
steps: Read about medicinal plants in the chapter
List five medicinal plants
Write one use of each plant
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn how plants are used in medicine

activities_projects.title: Wildlife in India List
activities_projects.objective: Identify major wildlife species in India
steps: Read the wildlife section
List ten animals found in India
Write the region where each animal is found

activities_projects.title: Biosphere Reserves Identification
activities_projects.objective: Learn about biosphere reserves in India
steps: Read the list of biosphere reserves in the chapter
Write any five biosphere reserves
Mention the state where each reserve is located

activities_projects.title: Endangered Species Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of protecting wildlife
steps: Discuss endangered animals in India
List three endangered species
Write two reasons why they are endangered
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about wildlife conservation

activities_projects.title: Forest Importance Paragraph
steps: Think about how forests help humans and animals
Write a short paragraph about the importance of forests
Include at least three benefits of forests
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students explain why forests are important
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and relevance of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Tree Plantation Awareness Poster
steps: Draw a poster encouraging tree plantation
Add slogans about saving forests
Display the poster in class
